rows.label: qev040901_MSG0001
rows.name:
You are here-mo! I was looking for you-mo!
Ever since then, Muimui has been using the Legend-Radar
and searching all over for the legendary signal-mo[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Finally, a reaction from the legendary sword was found
far to the north in the White Tree Continent-mo.
This time there is absolutely no mistake-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please-mo. Put Muimui in your bag
and take him to the White Tree Continent-mo.
I'm begging you-mo~ Let's go, to the White Tree Continent-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_JNK0010
rows.name: Admonish

rows.label: qev040901_SEL0011
rows.name:
Admonish Muimui that he should
walk there himself.

rows.label: qev040901_JNK0020
rows.name: Be Appalled

rows.label: qev040901_SEL0021
rows.name:
Be appalled by Muimui's
lazy attitude.

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Muimui's whole body is battered
from all the adventures up to now-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0005
rows.name:
But... no matter what happens,
I have no intention of giving up
until I find the legendary sword-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0006
rows.name:
I am intentionally preserving my stamina here
so I can go completely wild once we get there-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0007
rows.name:
I want you to read...
that spirit of Muimui's-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you just take me to the entrance of the White Tree Continent[ST:wide ]—
Seabird's Beak-[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0009
rows.name:
I will properly do my job,
so hurry up and put me in that warm-looking bag-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nii-chan, please be careful-mo.
Moimoi will stay here and watch the house-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Look forward to it-mo!
Well then, aiming for the legendary sword...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Forward march-mo! Go! In the bag,
Nopon-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Now, please hand the legendary sword
over to this mister-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Let's get a huge sum of money and quickly
go have a party with Moimoi-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Momo? Walter is nowhere to be found-mo~!
Maybe he is doing another job-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Even though we finally found the legendary sword,
we can't get our huge sum of money like this-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Good grief-mo~!
Hurry up and come back-mo~!![ST:wait ]
